en: This is bigger than that.
My cat is smaller than my dog.
You are taller than me.
This couch is more comfortable than yours.
Mercedes is more expensive than Renault.
Your hands are smaller than mine.
Ahmet is shorter than me.
My son is taller than me.

tr: Daha uzun bir hayat için sağlıklı besinler yiyorum.
en: I eat healthy food for a longer life.

tr: Daha yeni bir evde yaşamak istiyoruz.
en: We want to live in a newer house.
Your phone is newer than mine.

tr: Daha eski bir telefon satın almak istiyorum.
en: I want to buy an older phone.
My grandfather is older than my grandmother.
Houses are more expensive than cars.

tr: Daha ucuz bir kahvaltı için buradayız.
en: We are here for a cheaper breakfast.
Hakkari is colder than Ankara in the winters.
Antalya is hotter than Istanbul in the summers.

tr: Daha soğuk bir ülkede yaşamak istemiyorum.
en: I don't want to live in a colder country.
I want a hotter tea.
You are more beautiful than an angel.
English is very easy.
English is easier than Turkish.
Turkish is more difficult than English.

tr: Daha kolay bir hayat için Avrupa’ya gitmek istiyorum.
en: I want to go to Europe for an easier life.

tr: Daha hafif bir akşam yemeği yemek istiyorum.
en: I want to eat a lighter dinner.
My fridge is heavier than yours.
Ayşe is lighter than Ali.

tr: Kedimin göbeği bir yastıktan daha yumuşak.
en: My cat's belly is softer than a pillow.
My father is stronger than yours.
I'm weaker than a child.

tr: Daha güçlü bir country için çalışıyoruz.
en: We are working for a stronger country.
Their family is richer than us.

tr: Türkiye'deki insanlar Avrupa'daki insanlardan daha fakir.
en: The people in Turkey are poorer than the people in Europe.
I'm smarter than the students in the class.
You aren't as silly as me.

tr: Sen sınıftaki çocuklardan daha akıllı mısın?
en: Are you smarter than the children in the class?

tr: Bu araba seninkinden daha mı eski?
en: Is this car older than yours?
Everest is higher than Mount Ararat.
Mount Ararat is lower than Everest.
The Nile is longer than Kizilirmak.
We are healthier than them.

tr: Ali çok sinirli ve bir aslandan daha tehlikeli.
en: Ali is very angry and more dangerous than a lion.
The life is safer here.

tr: Daha temiz bir gömlek giymek istiyorum.
en: I want to wear a cleaner shirt.

tr: Daha tertipli bir insanla yaşamak istiyorum.
en: I want to live with a tidier person.
I have more important questions.

tr: Senin hayatın benimkinden daha mı önemli?
en: Is your life more important than mine?

tr: İnsanlar daha konforlu bir yaşam için İstanbul’a geliyorlar.
en: The people come to Istanbul for a more comfortable life.
This movie is more boring than my homework.

tr: Daha eğlenceli bir hayat için çok yaşlıyım.
en: I'm very old for a more fun life.
I think that I'm funnier than you.

tr: Biliyorum ki sen iyi bir öğrencisin.
en: I know that you are a good student.

tr: Senin iyi bir öğrenci olduğunu biliyorum.
en: I know that you are a good student.
My family is more important than everything.

tr: Senin için daha özel bir hediyem var.
en: I have a more special gift for you.

tr: Daha sıradan bir hayat için köyümde yaşamak istiyorum.
en: I want to live in my village for a more ordinary life.
I'm happier than a child today.
The winter is colder this year.
The summer is hotter this year.
I'm more tired than everyone.
This restaurant is busier than ours.
I don't want a busier career.

tr: İstanbul’daki trafik Ankara’daki trafikten daha yoğun.
en: The traffic in Istanbul is busier than the traffic in Ankara.
My house is closer to the hospital.
I'm with a closer friend.
You are uglier than a monkey.
You are more beautiful than a spring morning.
Porsche is a faster car.
Porsche is a fast car.
Porsche is a very fast car.
Porsche is as fast as Ferrari.
Porsche is faster than Ferrari.
Porsche isn't faster than Ferrari.
Is Porsche as fast as Ferrari?
Is Porsche faster than Ferrari?
My bus is earlier than yours.
I want to sleep earlier.
I want to wake up earlier.
Istanbul is more crowded than Ankara.
Villages are greener than cities.
Nights are darker than days.
Is the train faster than the bus?

tr: Senin doğum günün benimkinden daha mı erken?
en: Is your birthday earlier than mine?

tr: Senin arkadaşların benimkiler kadar zengin mi?
en: Are your friends as rich as mine?
Is Greece more beautiful than Turkey?

tr: Senin evin benimkinden daha mı düzenli?
en: Is your house tidier than mine?
